title: Suspicious Person Checking Car Handles
description: Saw someone in a black hoodie walking down Elm Street pulling on car door handles.
action_steps: Ensure all vehicle doors are locked.
Remove any valuables from plain sight.

title: Loud Construction Noise Early Morning
description: Construction crew on Maple Street started using jackhammers at 5:00 AM.
action_steps: Review permissible construction hours.
File a noise complaint.

title: Broken Streetlight on 5th Ave
description: The streetlight at the corner of 5th and Broad is completely dead, making it pitch black at night.
action_steps: Report the broken light to the city maintenance portal.
Be extra vigilant walking at night.

title: Parking Meter Scam QR Code
description: Found a fake QR code sticker placed over the parking meter payment slot.
action_steps: Do not scan unverified QR codes on public meters.
Use the official city parking App.
Report the meter to parking enforcement.

title: Traffic Light out at Main St
description: The main intersection traffic lights are flashing red in all directions causing a backup.
action_steps: Treat the intersection as a four-way stop.
Find alternate routes.

title: Amazon Delivery Phishing Text
description: I received an SMS claiming my Amazon package was delayed and asked me to pay a $2.99 fee by clicking a link.
action_steps: Do not click on links in unsolicited messages.
Check your Amazon account directly.

title: Stray Golden Retriever Found
description: Found a sweet golden retriever wandering near the Uptown park. Has a red collar but no tags.
action_steps: Check local lost pet groups online.
Take the dog to a local vet to check for a microchip.

title: Late Night Fireworks
description: Someone was setting off loud fireworks near the Uptown High School field at 11:30 PM.
action_steps: Close windows and comfort pets if necessary.

title: Stolen Bicycle from Porch
description: My blue Trek bicycle was taken from my front porch overnight. Cable lock was cut.
action_steps: File a police report with the bike's serial number.
Bring bikes indoors or use a heavy-duty U-lock.

title: Pothole Damaging Cars
description: There is a massive pothole in the right lane on 3rd St. Two cars already blew tires.
action_steps: Avoid the right lane on 3rd St.
Report the pothole to the city transportation department.

title: Flooded Road near the River
description: Heavy rain caused River Road to flood near the old bridge. Several cars are stuck.
action_steps: Use alternate routes to avoid the flooded area.
Do not attempt to drive through deep water.

title: Fake Survey Email for Credit Card Details
description: Sent an email about a 'Riverside Community Survey' promising a $50 gift card, asking for SSN.
action_steps: Never provide social security or card details in random surveys.
Mark the email as phishing.

title: Coyote Sighting in Park
description: Saw a large coyote near the Riverside nature trail. It didn't seem afraid of people.
action_steps: Keep small pets on a tight leash.
Do not run from coyotes; make yourself look large and make noise.

title: Loud Boat Party
description: A boat docked near the marina has been blasting bass-heavy music since 10 PM.
action_steps: Contact the harbor master if the noise violates marina quiet hours.

title: Suspicious Door-to-Door Sales
description: Two individuals claiming to sell magazine subscriptions were looking into folks' windows.
action_steps: Do not open the door to unverified solicitors.
Lock doors and report the activity to non-emergency police.

title: Power Outage affecting 3 Blocks
description: Lost power around Oak street and Pine line. Heard a loud pop from the transformer up the road.
action_steps: Report the outage to the local power utility.
Keep refrigerators closed to preserve food.

title: Teenagers throwing fireworks late night
description: A group of kids were setting off loud fireworks near the elementary school track.
action_steps: Keep pets indoors and calm.

title: Mail Theft from Mailboxes
description: Someone has been opening un-locked mailboxes on Pine street looking for checks.
action_steps: Retrieve mail daily.
Sign up for USPS Informed Delivery.
Consider getting a locking mailbox.

title: Fake Charity Call on Phone
description: Got a call from a number claiming to be a police charity asking for credit card donations.
action_steps: Hang up on unsolicited charity calls.
If you wish to donate, go directly to the organization's official website.

title: Loud Lawn Mower Early Sunday
description: Neighbor at the corner of Cedar and Elm mowing their lawn at 6 AM on a Sunday.
action_steps: Talk to your neighbor amicably about weekend quiet hours.

title: Netflix Account Suspended Scam
description: Got a text saying my Netflix billing failed and to click a link. The URL looked like net-flix-billing-update.info.
action_steps: Do not click the link.
Log into Netflix directly.
Block the sender.

title: Missing Orange Tabby Cat
description: My mostly orange cat Barnaby got out tonight. He's wearing a blue collar. If seen, please let me know.
action_steps: Leave some familiar-smelling items outside.
Check under porches or in open garages.

title: Graffiti on Park Benches
description: Noticed several benches in Northridge Park have been heavily vandalized with spray paint.
action_steps: Report graffiti to the city parks department for clean-up.

title: Realtor Scam targeting Seniors
description: A man claiming to be a realtor is aggressively knocking on doors asking to appraise homes for cash offers immediately.
action_steps: Do not invite unsolicited individuals into your home.
Report aggressive solicitation to the police.

title: Barking dogs waking everyone up
description: The house on the corner of Summit drive leaves their three large dogs out all night and they bark at every passing car.
action_steps: Leave a polite note or speak with the neighbor.
Contact animal control if the issue persists long-term.

title: Package Thieves Following Delivery Truck
description: A silver sedan with out-of-state plates is trailing an Amazon truck. They grabbed a box from my porch.
action_steps: Require signature delivery.
Report suspicious vehicles.
Retrieve packages promptly.

title: Fake Microsoft Support Caller
description: Someone with a heavy accent called my elderly mother claiming they need to install remote software.
action_steps: Microsoft never proactively calls you.
Never install AnyDesk or TeamViewer from random callers.

title: Speeding cars on residential road
description: Cars are continuing to use Willow Creek Blvd as a drag strip late at night going well over 60 mph.
action_steps: Petition the city to install speed bumps or a stop sign.
Request increased police patrols late at night.

title: Blocked storm drain
description: The main drain on 7th and Willow is completely blocked by debris, and water is pooling into the street.
action_steps: Call the city water and sewer department.
Drive slowly to avoid hydroplaning.

title: Crypto Scam on WhatsApp
description: Received a message from an unknown number pretending to be an old acquaintance proposing a crypto investment.
action_steps: Do not engage with strangers offering investment advice via text.
Block and report the number within WhatsApp.
